message.content:
[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly Surge in Google Trends for 'Warehouse Automation' Signals Industrial Sector Demand",
    "family": "attention_sentiment",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "An increasing interest in warehouse automation indicates growing investment and activity in industrial logistics and manufacturing automation.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Increased searches for warehouse automation typically precede capital expenditure and growth in industrial sector companies."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly Google Trends interest for 'warehouse automation' rises by more than 15% from previous week",
      "exit": "After 4 weeks or if interest drops below prior 4-week average",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Google Trends data for this term frequently shows weekly fluctuations above 15% due to ongoing supply chain investment news."
  },
  {
    "idea": "USGS Earthquake Activity Spike Near Major Freight Hubs Signals Temporary Freight Disruption",
    "family": "freight_logistics",
    "data": {
      "source": "USGS earthquake activity",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "daily",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sudden increase in earthquake tremors near major freight hubs can disrupt logistics and shipping routes, impacting industrial production.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Freight disruptions impair industrial supply chains and manufacturing output, pressuring industrial stocks."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If number of earthquakes with magnitude >3.0 near top 5 US freight hubs increases by 50% over 3 days",
      "exit": "After 7 trading days or when earthquake activity normalizes to baseline",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "daily",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Seismic activity near freight hubs occasionally clusters, creating short-term disruptions detectable in USGS data."
  },
  {

    },

      "exit": "After 6 weeks or when interest falls below 10% above baseline",

    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",

    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Labor stress signals on Google Trends for layoffs often spike multiple times a year in reaction to economic shifts."
  },
  {

    },

    },

    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Daily EV charger additions fluctuate regularly due to project completions and announcements."
  },
